description: Black heels from catwalk created for the understated fashionista. Pair these shoes with bright colours in your ensemble.Heels: 2.5"UpperCriss crossing synthetic leather strap at the forefootMidfoot strapCushioned footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style with a brand patch at the heelOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
